ghr v0.7.5 is a maintainability and polish release: the large application module is split into focused pieces, details rendering tests are steadier, and light theme navigation labels are easier to read.

Highlights:

- Split more of `app.rs` into focused modules for input handling, switchers, runtime helpers, participants, dialogs, drafts, rendering, and tests.
- Light theme navigation labels now use stronger contrast for `GHR` and `Sections`, and the app name is consistently capitalized as `GHR` in the UI.
- Details rendering tests now account for inline copy controls while still checking the rendered markdown content.
- Release docs and pinned install examples now point at v0.7.5.

Install:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenyukang/ghr/main/install.sh | sh
```

Windows PowerShell:

```powershell
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenyukang/ghr/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Cargo:

```bash
cargo install ghr-cli
```
